name: PHOENIX MOTOR INC.
business: Phoenix Motor Inc. designs, develops, manufactures, assembles, and integrates electric drive systems and light and medium duty electric vehicles, including electric transit buses, medium-duty electric vehicles, chargers, and electric forklifts. It sells to commercial fleet customers such as transit agencies, airports, universities, utilities, and corporate campuses. As of December 31, 2024, it has delivered 138 EVs and 30 transit buses to customers.

exposures.sentence: Phoenix designs, develops, manufactures, assembles, and integrates electric drive systems and light and medium duty electric vehicles ( EVs ), with an aim to reduce carbon intensity and greenhouse gas ( GHG ) emissions.

Our Gen 4 drivetrain, offering battery pack capacities of 90kWh and 150kWh with both Buy America and non Buy America options, allowing for flexibility in pricing and configuration primarily targeting the transit bus, school bus, airport shuttle, delivery truck and work truck segments.
Phoenix Motorcars which is focused on commercial products including medium duty electric vehicles, chargers and electric forklifts.

tamClaims.claim: The commercial EV market is projected to grow from a low base today to global sales of three million units by 2025 and nine million by 2030.
tamClaims.sentence: The commercial EV market, which we believe is currently underserved, is projected to grow from a low base today to global sales of three million units by 2025 and nine million by 2030, led by buses and light trucks, representing significant growth opportunities.
